Body copy raised to the type scale; 6 remaining sub-13px spans are secondary metadata, not primary content.

Active nav link #c62828 on #28151b = 3.07:1; five sidebar links #5c5c68 on #121219 = 2.82:1; both need 4.5:1 at 16px. axe also reports 2 link-name violations (serious).
